programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.sub-title: A Garden for All; Band of Explorers
programme.desc: Elinor gives Hazel some strawberry seeds to grow at home; the Exploring Club goes on a musical march in the forest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: Song of the Summer; Leapin' Lizards
programme.desc: Alma invites her friends to a Sonny Soto concert; Alma discovers that bearded dragons are not as scary as she thought.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly and Trini look for firewood to make treats, but plans are interrupted by a storm; Molly and Tooey hope to teach Trini how to skate in time for the River Skate and bonfire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Albert Einstein; I Am Carol Burnett
programme.desc: Albert Einstein encourages Xavier to ask questions when he is curious about something; Carol Burnett helps Yadina overcome her fear of looking silly by explaining that sometimes it is good to laugh at yourself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1981 "Raiders of the Lost Ark" prototype; a 1788 Elizabeth Shoemaker sampler; 1976 and 1977 Roy De Forest mixed media artwork.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death.

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Jo recommits to his family; Soames and Irene's Parisian honeymoon is cut short.

programme.title: California's Gold
programme.desc: Nitt Witt Ridge in Cambria Pines, a folk art home built from cement and objects such as bottle caps and toilet seats.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: The U.S. and the Holocaust
programme.desc: As World War II begins, Americans unite in their disapproval of Nazi brutality and work to help refugees escape; Germany invades the Soviet Union and secretly begins the mass murder of European Jews.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Defying the Nazis: The Sharps' War
programme.desc: Waitstill and Martha Sharp, a Unitarian minister and his wife from Wellesley, Mass., leave their children behind in the care of their parish and commit to multiple life-threatening missions in Europe. Over two years, they help to save hundreds of imperilled political dissidents and Jewish refugees fleeing the Nazi occupation across Europe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Mapping the roots of actress Kate Burton and media mogul Barry Diller.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: The U.S. and the Holocaust
programme.desc: As World War II begins, Americans unite in their disapproval of Nazi brutality and work to help refugees escape; Germany invades the Soviet Union and secretly begins the mass murder of European Jews.

programme.title: Defying the Nazis: The Sharps' War
programme.desc: Waitstill and Martha Sharp, a Unitarian minister and his wife from Wellesley, Mass., leave their children behind in the care of their parish and commit to multiple life-threatening missions in Europe. Over two years, they help to save hundreds of imperilled political dissidents and Jewish refugees fleeing the Nazi occupation across Europe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nature Cat
programme.sub-title: Agents of the Great Outdoors; The Nature-tastic Four
programme.desc: Nature Cat and the gang help deliver a possum's letter to his wife in the big city; the crew must stop an evil gerbil from stealing the sunset.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Luke plays doctor with Stu as a nurse and Lyla pretends to be different patients; Lyla, Everett, Luke and Stu build an elaborate track to get a tennis ball down to the lobby.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: The Pea and the Princess; D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: Prunella is directing the third-grade's production of "The Princess and the Pea," but nothing seems to go according to her plan; D.W. is determined to watch a new television show after her parents tell her she's too young to watch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: A Town Called Trifle; I Am Oddius
programme.desc: During the town of Trifle's 100-year anniversary party, Ozzie and Onom must stop Tracey Trifler from covering it in trifle; Osric and Omni try to stop a Roman gladiator from causing ancient oddness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Chris and Martin search for an obscure rain forest creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters head to a nearby mountain to learn about snow.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Our Blue and Green World
programme.desc: While doing their annual Laundry Day, the Kratt brothers disagree on what is better -- blue oceans or green forests.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel's Obstacle Course; Daniel Plays in a Gentle Way
programme.desc: Margaret gets upset when Daniel is too fast and too loud on the obstacle course; Daniel and his friends learn that sometimes it is important to play slowly and gently.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe, Jay and Lupe practice their fire safety plan when the fire inspector visits; Phoebe and Jay buy juice from Mr. Aguilar.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Chris, Elmo and Abby help Fido feel proud that he's a frog.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.desc: It's Backwards Day in the Treeborhood; Cece, Carly and Clyde have fun with patterns.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.desc: Donkey is disappointed to miss Cheesy Con after she hurts her hoof; Stanley's pals help him get things back on track for his one-dragon show.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Rosie in the City; Rosie in the Country
programme.desc: Rosie, Javi and Papa go on an adventure when Javi's dragon gets lost in the city; Rosie looks for blue bonnets in the country.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: Elinor and her friends investigate the purpose of smell; Elinor is excited to explore with Camilla Dromedary, but Camilla is more interested in playing dress up.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.sub-title: Howard Brings the Beat; Alma's Payday
programme.desc: Alma helps Howard find a drum when he joins the neighborhood drum circle; Alma and Junior try to earn toy tickets.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly, Trini and Nina go out to pick cloudberries to make a pie for Molly's mom; Molly and Tooey find a strange box under the floorboards and discover something valuable inside.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1929 New York Yankees partial team-signed ball; a New Mexico mining league trophy and photos; a Plains Indian child's beaded shirt.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: A panel of journalists provides reporting and analysis of the major stories emanating from the United States capital.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Margaret Hoover leads interviews and debates.

programme.title: To Be Takei
programme.desc: Together with his husband Brad, actor-activist George Takei parlays his remarkable acting career and wicked sense of humor into a new role as beloved pop-culture icon and Internet phenomenon.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.sub-title: Now Hear This: Everyone Loves Joplin
programme.desc: Uncovering the lasting impact of ragtime composer Scott Joplin on today's orchestras; a restaging of Joplin's magnum opus "Treemonisha" for the 21st century.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: A More Perfect Union: Inspiring Civic & Civil Conversations Across America
programme.desc: A look at America's founding and how the ideas and values articulated 250 years ago remain relevant to conversations about governance today.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Exploring how the American Revolution affected Britain, with sabotage, espionage and political unrest reshaping the empire.

programme.title: A More Perfect Union: Inspiring Civic & Civil Conversations Across America
programme.desc: A look at America's founding and how the ideas and values articulated 250 years ago remain relevant to conversations about governance today.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: Jogging in Hyde Park; British Museum; Victoria and Albert Museum; East End food tour; celebrating London's regeneration.

programme.title: Samantha Brown's Places to Love
programme.desc: Motel Safari keeps the spirit of Route 66 alive with mid-century modern architecture, themed rooms and neon signs; the Santa Rosa Route 66 Car Museum; Santa Fe; the Man's Hat Shop; Grants, N.M.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Autograph Collection; the Rope Collection
programme.desc: When Nico teases Carl about bikes being for babies, he sets out to prove Nico wrong; Carl and his Fuzzytown friends can't wait to build a tree fort, but Carl has a hard time working as a team.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.sub-title: Rocket Jaw: Rescuer of the Reef
programme.desc: Martin and Chris try to stop robotic parrotfish from collecting coral.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: A Town Called Trifle; I Am Oddius

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aging Backwards 3: Fast Track With Miranda Esmonde-White
programme.desc: Miranda Esmonde-White develops a practical six-point plan that focuses on gentle daily movement to keep the mind sharp and body active at any age.

programme.title: Magic Moments -- The Best of '50s Pop (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Phyllis McGuire, Pat Boone and Nick Clooney host a trip back to the 1950s with a mix of live performance and archival footage featuring classic moments from artists such as Perry Como, Debbie Reynolds and the McGuire Sisters.

programme.title: All New Rock, Pop and Doo Wop (My Music Presents)
programme.desc: Full-length performances from various artists of the 1950s and 1960s, including Johnny Maestro, The Duprees, Jay Black, Little Anthony & The Imperials, Ronnie Spector, Frankie Valli, Jerry Butler and more.
